questions.question: Who is the central figure in 'A Truly Beautiful Mind'?
questions.explanation: The chapter highlights the life and achievements of Albert Einstein, a renowned scientist.

questions.question: What is Albert Einstein famous for?
questions.correct_answer: Theory of Relativity and contributions to physics
questions.explanation: Einstein revolutionized science with his theories and discoveries.

questions.question: How was Einstein as a child?
questions.correct_answer: Curious, slow in speech, and fascinated by questions about nature
questions.explanation: As a child, he asked many questions and showed an unusual interest in learning.

questions.question: What obstacles did Einstein face in his early life?
questions.correct_answer: Difficulty in school and being considered a slow learner
questions.explanation: Despite initial struggles, his curiosity and determination helped him succeed.

questions.question: What lesson does the chapter convey?
questions.correct_answer: Curiosity, perseverance, and independent thinking lead to great achievements
questions.explanation: Einstein’s story shows that a truly beautiful mind combines curiosity with hard work.

questions.question: How did Einstein’s curiosity manifest?
questions.correct_answer: He asked many questions about how things work and thought deeply about nature
questions.explanation: Even as a child, he questioned norms and explored ideas beyond textbooks.

questions.question: Why is Einstein called a 'truly beautiful mind'?
questions.correct_answer: Because of his intelligence, creativity, and revolutionary thinking
questions.explanation: His ability to imagine, question, and create scientific theories defines his brilliance.

questions.question: What role did perseverance play in Einstein’s life?
questions.correct_answer: It helped him overcome early difficulties and achieve success
questions.explanation: Despite being underestimated, he continued learning and pursuing science.

questions.question: What is the central theme of the chapter?
questions.correct_answer: Importance of curiosity, perseverance, and independent thinking
questions.explanation: The chapter emphasizes that a great mind combines intelligence with persistent inquiry.

questions.question: How did Einstein’s work impact the world?
questions.correct_answer: He changed the way we understand space, time, and physics
questions.explanation: His theories influenced modern science and technology profoundly.

notes.title: Albert Einstein – Early Life
notes.content: Curious child, slow to speak, fascinated by questions about nature.

notes.title: Achievements
notes.content: Known for Theory of Relativity and groundbreaking contributions to physics.

notes.title: Curiosity and Learning
notes.content: Einstein’s curiosity and questioning nature fueled his discoveries.

notes.title: Perseverance
notes.content: Persistence helped him overcome obstacles and achieve greatness.

notes.title: Theme
notes.content: Curiosity, perseverance, and independent thinking lead to a beautiful mind.

facts.fact: Einstein was slow in speaking as a child but very curious.
He faced difficulties in school but continued learning independently.
A truly beautiful mind combines intelligence, curiosity, and creativity.
